item.title: Saifuddin Nasution: 1,050 certified Quran copies cleared for printing and distribution nationwide
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — The government has approved 1,050 final proofs of Quranic texts and materials for pri...
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: James Chai appoints lawyers, pledges full cooperation with MACC
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The former aide to ex-economy minister Rafizi Ramli says his lawyers would liaise with MACC to arrange a session for him to give his statement.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Isa files review to set aside corruption conviction
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Among the grounds for the former Felda chairman's review is an alleged breach of natural justice.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Anwar: Islamic State-linked extremist activity under control, but Malaysia must stay vigilant
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SEBERANG PERAI, March 7 — Islamic State (IS)-linked extremist activities in Malaysia are under control due to the...
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: FT mufti urges calm as Quran case reaches court
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ahmad Fauwaz Fadzil says Muslims should control their emotions, refrain from acting impulsively, and let the law take its course.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Hold state and Dewan elections together, says Johor PH
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The state PH sets up four new committees in preparation for the coming state assembly and parliamentary elections.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), election(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: 4 M-League players suspended 12 months after CAS decision, says MFL
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
They are among the seven who were sanctioned by Fifa for falsifying naturalisation and eligibility documents to represent Malaysia.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Kiandee and Mas Ermieyati confirm show-cause letters from Bersatu disciplinary board
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — Bersatu vice-president Datuk Seri Ronald Kiandee said he has been asked to explain himself...
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Anwar stops by Penang Hospital to visit ‘old friend’ and PAS spiritual leader Hashim Jasin
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim visited PAS spiritual leader Datuk Hashim Jasin at...
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Chinese voters no longer loyal to any party, says MCA sec-gen
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Chong Sin Woon says last year’s Sabah election showed voters will shift support if parties fail to deliver on promises.
Matched: war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Cops need more time to complete terrorism ideology probe, says minister
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Saifuddin Nasution Ismail says the process cannot be completed within just two or three days, even if the suspects involved are minors.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Saifuddin Nasution: Police require longer investigation for six suspects, including three minors, linked to Daesh
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KULIM, March 7 — Police require a longer investigation period to probe a case involving six local males, wit...
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Amir Hamzah: Malaysia’s stable govt allows bold policy decisions, supportive approach needed
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — Malaysia’s stable government has made good progress with its supportive policie...
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Govt approves plan to evacuate Malaysians from high-risk Middle East areas, says Mohamad Hassan
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SEREMBAN, March 7 — The government has, in principle, approved a plan to relocate or evacuate Malaysians from high...
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Sarawak PAS eyes Beting Maro, 3 other seats in upcoming state polls
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
State commissioner Arifiriazul Paijo says the party is open to collaboration with PBDS and fielding non-Muslim candidates through its supporters' wing.
Matched: breaking(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Fahmi welcomes Indonesia’s ban on high-risk platforms for under-16s, Malaysia ready to cooperate
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — Malaysia supports Indonesia’s efforts to ban access to high-risk digital platfo...
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Activist calls for HR ministry to oversee foreign worker recruitment
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Adrian Pereira says the current system is plagued by misconduct, while Charles Santiago calls for the process to be digitalised for greater transparency.
Matched: ministry(+2), corruption(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: I’ll draft the letter now, KJ says after ‘return to Umno’ call
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Three-term MP Khairy Jamaluddin was sacked from Umno in January 2023 for breaching party discipline during the 2022 general election.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Zahid’s offer may be bid to lure Hamzah back to Umno, says KJ
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The ex-Umno Youth chief says the move could be a tactical response after Hamzah Zainudin was linked to plans to form or lead a new party.
Matched: corruption(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Spend prudently this Raya, Anwar advises Malaysians amid global economic uncertainty
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
SEBERANG PERAI, March 7 — Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim has advised the public to be prudent in their sp...
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Stop exploiting DBKL consultations for personal gain, says Yeoh
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The federal territories minister says some demand gadgets, cash or discounts from developers and even threaten protests to gain personal benefits.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Hannah Yeoh warns KL residents against abusing DBKL consultations to seek personal perks
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 7 — Some Kuala Lumpur residents have been purportedly misusing Kuala Lumpur City Hall’s...
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Lufthansa to return to KLIA after nearly a decade with five weekly Frankfurt flights
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA, March 7 — Lufthansa German Airlines will resume direct services between Kuala Lumpur and Frankfurt at t...
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: BN should go solo in Melaka, Johor polls, says Wee
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The MCA president says it is reasonable for Barisan Nasional to seek a fresh mandate from voters in both states.
Matched: war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)
